description: The Rinaldi clan is a Camorra clan based in San Giovanni a Teduccio, Naples, founded in 1989 after splitting from the Mazzarella clan. It is involved in murder, extortion, drug trafficking, racketeering, and counterfeiting. Since 2019, it has formed a powerful alliance with the De Luca Bossa and Aprea-Cuccaro clans, dominating eastern Naples. The clan is allied with the Secondigliano Alliance and remains active.
